untranslatable_reason: Signal requires stationarized time series (CN operator) and multi-standard-deviation bands calculated dynamically over 41-period lookback. No stationarity operator or dynamic z-score/standard deviation indicator available in allowed list. BB bands are fixed-period only. Would need custom z-score or stationarity indicator to properly implement extreme value detection at ±1.5 std devs and transition confirmation.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using sma_40 (41-period lookback) as proxy for mean-reversion signal, but this does NOT capture the required stationarity transformation or multi-std-dev extreme detection logic. Proper implementation requires a z-score or custom stationarity indicator not in the allowed set.
